chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1433 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.6876/2021 (Ex./A) 2. For hearing of main case 09.05.2024 Mr. Ziaul Haque Kamboh, Advocate for respondent No.5. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for Town Committee Padidan along with Town Officer Aftab Jani Mallah is present, has filed progress report along with a photo stat copy of cheque No.41428608 dated 23.04.2024 of Rs.4,80,510/- (Rupees four lac eighty thousand five hundred ten) in favour of petitioner for payment of leave encashment. He submits that this cheque has been given to the petitioner. Apart from it, almost Rs.14,00,000/- (Rupees fourteen lac) would be still outstanding. He undertakes that within four months, entire payment would be made without fail as necessary correspondence has been made for release of amount. Meanwhile, monthly pension would be paid to the petitioner. In view of above, this petition is disposed of along with listed application. The instructions / directions given in the order dated 16.04.2024 in respect of salary of Town Officer Aftab Jani Mallah, Town Committee Padidan and closure of accounts of said town committee are recalled. After four months, compliance report be submitted for a perusal in chamber. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
